div.h4: We are pleased to quote you the following:

p.span: We will be happy to supply any further information you may need and trust that you call on us to fill your order, which will receive our prompt and careful attention. The prices can be changed at anytime due to the high demand in this season.
سنكون سعداء لتقديم أي معلومات إضافية قد تحتاجها وتثق في أنك تتصل بنا لملء طلبك ، والتي ستحظى باهتمامنا الفوري والدقيق. يمكن تغيير الأسعار في أي وقت بسبب ارتفاع الطلب في هذا الموسم

table.style: background-color: #fff; font-family:Verdana, Arial,sans-serif; color: #454748; width: 100%; border-collapse:separate;

div.div:
Dear
Greetings from !
We are pleased to offer below.
BELOW OFFERS ALSO INCLUDES FOLLOWING EXTRAS:
Service charge by Hotel/Resorts, Government taxes
On Arrival: Meet & greet service, assistance with the luggage
Return Transfers: International Airport - Hotel/Resort - International Airport
Meal Plan: as specified in the quotation/package
On Departure: Meet & greet service, assistance with the luggage & Check-in assistance at Airport
Below offers are valid only until
Villas are available at the moment but are SUBJECT TO AVAILABILITY AT THE TIME OF RESERVATIONS.
